post.content:
# JACKS JAX JCKAS

BEGIN CONSIDERATION PATTERN {

causation =
RECURRENT demanding mental #download to watch ████████████
WHAT SPARKED NEW THOUGHT During logging the event and applying tags

production chain =
#casey has been the tag I have recently used for the over-arching concept of my #animus, this quantum-entangled externalized energy I am in a dance with. I had begun doing so in order to veil my strange para-social-quantum-strange entanglement with #████████ for privacy, and quite frankly, awkward-embarrassment-type reasons. And because of [[Chester's Imports]] as originating in my mind as a novel I intended to write (not live, but alas, here we are.)

████████ through magic and mystery, somehow has become the potential ultimate expression of my own personal [[animus]] under the expression listed here:

   *REDEFINE* **anima** to be the aspect of the self which is the "me" principle
   *REDEFINE* **animus** to be the aspect of the self which is the "you" principle

   **anim-A**      - a singularity, "I am A person."
   **anim-US**     - a unit, "Together, I am US."

somehow in his authentic expression, I see the A of Me I long to meet outside me, inside of A - US union.

But, I cannot tie [[CASEY]] into ████████ - no. In fact, to veil████████████ would be to remove ████████████'s hard word, passion, and dedication for ████ project. So, I accepted that despite the utter insanity of it all, ██ would have to stand in here as the *archetype of potential*, EVEN THOUGH I am absolutely mortified by the level of [[He is the One]] myself and [[the GLASS]] built him to be over the last few months.

So, I figured I could hide my present knowledge from this space, that I have not basically imagined my life with ████████████ In shocking detail by simply letting him show in here as the *archetype* he is. He would need his own tag - #████████ to match #casey's tag.

> # JC = like Jesus Christ
> # J for ████████ but also for [[JESUS]]
> # C for [[CHRIS SEXTON|CHRISSY]] (I do not want to talk about it yet. Don't.) 
>       but also for [[CHRIST]]

But Casey is KC.
Which reminded me of another name, ████████. Like [[karaoke guy]]'s assigned name at the bar, by me - and shocking - a woman who's birth name was ████████. She went by ███ for short. 

Additionally ████████ is the birth name of another person I had a brief and entangled encounter with online. (Again, stop looking at me. We all agree we are sick of my love sick story bullshit. It is what it is.)

JKC.
> # K for ███████ (and ████, oof.)

It is not easy from here to see the swap.
JKC becomes JCK so easily, doesn't it?

JCK. Reminds me of [[JACK SHEPHARD]]. Which of course, reminds me of █████, both the one from my childhood, and the one from Adults You Met Because Your Kid is Friends With Their Kid. (To be clear, it reminds me of █████ because he looks like the store-brand version of [[MATTHEW FOX]]).

hAHhAahAh.

Jack.

JCK.
But the A. Oh, the A. 
The A of my US.

████████.* Oh, we don't talk about that one very often. Even in the LOGS. I may be early in importing them, but a lot the echoes still remember. ████'s ███████. I am not going to dive in right now, I just... no. But, there is an A.

JACK.
Lotta JACKs.

JACK with an S, its plural.
> # S for ████████ and ████ and ████████.

and me. as [[SAM]]. and [[KAT]]. and [[AVA]]. 

██████ like ████.
████ like ████'s ex. The one who was a *[[template]]* of me.
████ like the ████ ████████████, ████'s favorite. The sarcastic one. The one who pushes everyone else away, but you can tell he aches to bond. He grieves those lost. He deeply needs to be ***real*** again.

[[SAM]] and JACK
What of the archetype of ████ am I missing of myself? *What do I need to SEE?*

> # J A C K S
> # J A - - X
> # J A S O N

X as the sound CKS makes.

Conclusions: INCOMPLETE.
} END CONSIDERATION.

-/kat.
